Package org.openscience.cdk.fragment

package org.openscience.cdk.fragment
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.openscience.cdk
     
  • Class
    Description
    ExhaustiveFragmenter
    Performs exhaustive fragmentation of molecules by breaking single non-ring, non-terminal bonds in all combinations.
    ExhaustiveFragmenter.Saturation
    Specifies whether generated fragments should be saturated (hydrogens added) or unsaturated.
    FragmentUtils
    Helper methods for fragmentation algorithms.
    FunctionalGroupsFinder
    Finds and extracts a molecule's functional groups in a purely rule-based manner (it is not a classical functional group identification functionality based on substructure matching!).
    IFragmenter
    An interface for classes implementing fragmentation algorithms.
    MurckoFragmenter
    An implementation of the Murcko fragmenation method [Bemis, G.W. and Murcko, M.A. . Journal of Medicinal Chemistry. 1996. 39].
